productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Blue & White Shoes
description: Style NoteAn eclectic fusion of hot style and cutting edge design, this shoe from flying machine is a great way to attain a cult status. Made with a canvas and rubber upper, this is a must-have in your casual wardrobe.Product DetailsCanvas and synthetic upper with central lace-ups, inlays and overlaysPadded tongue and innerEVA midsoleDurable rubber outsole with patterned grooves Material and CareCanvas, rubber, syntheticMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water.
